docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BROWN, MARK E. AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS SINGH, M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS
DEFENDANT FILED "LATE" REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. ($10.00 FEE PAID BY CHECK) COMMISSIONER TO SIGN ORDER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-29-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-24-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTFF'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; $10 FEE PAID; TO: FOLDER/TRAY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-24-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-21-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, MARK E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS SINGH, M. $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,330.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $500.00 TO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF FOR HIS INSURANCE DEDUCTIBLE, AND $750.00 FOR BODILY INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BROWN, MARK E.
